chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 726 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.3485/2020 2. For hearing of main case 13.05.2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Mohsin Ali Shah advocate holds brief for Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner submits upon instructions that the petition is not pressed to the extent that application made on behalf of the petitioner, available at page 161 of the court file, be decided vide a speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
